title: Wool Recipes for Indev
description: A mod that adds recipes for otherwise unobtainable colors of wool.
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b9b474b8128e088825c1cb25e17b042b47c230d.png)
At long last, you can use all the colorful wool you want in a survival-friendly way without having to dabble in the likes of an NBT editor!



This mod aims to make every unobtainable color of wool craftable, using materials found around your world.



This mod adds 32 recipes, they are pictured below;
![Recipes for every color of wool](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d872a991af21a1456b4390e3596853f383910a6c.png)


## How  to install?

This mod is a "jar mod", as such, it doen't use any modloader, meaning you'll either need to use a mod-friendly launcher or insert the files into the jar file of your minecraft version.

### If you use MultiMC, Prism, BetaCraft 2.0 or a similar launcher:
  1. Click "Edit" on your instance
  2. On the "Versions" tab, click "Add to Minecraft.jar"
  3. Navigate to and select the downloaded file

### If you arent using one of those:
  1. Navigate to your .minecraft folder, then to "versions"
  2. Find "in-20100223.jar" and open it
  3. Open the downloaded file and drag the folders inside "in-20100223.jar" (You may need to delete META-INF)
